svg.text: patterns/{group}{nn} — 4-byte header + n × 8-byte event records, sorted by position_ticks ascending

g.text: patterns/a01 — 1-bar pattern, 4 events on pad 1, captured-style values
was a real regression bug in early ports. must
equal scene length, or playback skews mid-song.
had this wrong; tests/test_song_format.py guards it.
0x08 has been observed on last events
but its exact meaning isn't fully understood.
1536 ticks total · header[1] = 0x04 · scene length must match
duration=96 (0x0060) — a short trigger; in bpm mode the
slice plays its own length regardless of duration_ticks.
events MUST be sorted by position_ticks ascending. build_pattern auto-sorts; raw writers must too — out-of-order events corrupt playback.
